name: player_segment
description: 玩家分群行为分析模板：付费玩家付费点、玩法参与、沉默玩家现状、免费玩家行为、Top 明细

overview.name: 概览
overview.sql:
WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_paid, total_pay_money, role_level, role_vip
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_paid, total_pay_money, role_level, role_vip,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC) AS rn
    FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_snap_rolecache
    WHERE game_id = '312'
      AND ds >= '{analysis_start}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
classified AS (
  SELECT
    a.role_id,
    CASE
      WHEN p.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
      WHEN s.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
      WHEN ls.role_paid = 0 OR ls.role_id IS NULL THEN '免费玩家'
      ELSE '沉默玩家'
    END AS segment
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON a.role_id = ls.role_id
),
pay_analysis AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  segment AS 分群,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.role_id) AS 人数,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN c.role_id END) AS 付费人数,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS 充值金额,
  COALESCE(SUM(pa.pay_times), 0) AS 充值次数,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT c.role_id) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.role_id), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS ARPU,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN c.role_id END) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN c.role_id END), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS ARPPU
FROM classified c
LEFT JOIN pay_analysis pa ON c.role_id = pa.role_id
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY CASE segment WHEN '付费玩家' THEN 1 WHEN '沉默玩家' THEN 2 WHEN '免费玩家' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

paid_recharge.name: 付费玩家付费点
paid_recharge.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(CAST(pay_itemid AS VARCHAR), '') AS 商品ID,
  CASE pay_type WHEN 1 THEN '购买钻石' WHEN 2 THEN '购买商品' ELSE CAST(pay_type AS VARCHAR) END AS 充值类型,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS 付费人数,
  COUNT(*) AS 付费次数,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS 充值金额,
  ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS 客单价
FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
WHERE game_id = 312
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  {server_filter}
GROUP BY COALESCE(CAST(pay_itemid AS VARCHAR), ''), pay_type
ORDER BY 充值金额 DESC
LIMIT 50

paid_engagement.name: 付费玩家玩法参与
paid_engagement.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
behavior_all AS (
  SELECT b_type, role_id, COUNT(*) AS events
  FROM gameeco_odl.v_presto_log_rolebehavior
  WHERE game_id = '312'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY b_type, role_id
),
behavior_paid AS (
  SELECT b_type, role_id, events
  FROM behavior_all
  WHERE role_id IN (SELECT role_id FROM paid)
)
SELECT
  b_type AS 玩法模块,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ba.role_id) AS 活跃参与人数,
  SUM(ba.events) AS 活跃总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(ba.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ba.role_id), 0), 1) AS 活跃人均次数,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bp.role_id) AS 付费参与人数,
  SUM(bp.events) AS 付费总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(bp.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT bp.role_id), 0), 1) AS 付费人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT bp.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ba.role_id), 0) * 100, 2) AS 付费参与率
FROM behavior_all ba
LEFT JOIN behavior_paid bp ON ba.b_type = bp.b_type AND ba.role_id = bp.role_id
GROUP BY b_type
ORDER BY 活跃总次数 DESC
LIMIT 50

silent_behavior.name: 沉默玩家现状
silent_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, total_pay_money,
         from_unixtime(last_pay_time) AS last_pay_time
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, total_pay_money, last_pay_time,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC) AS rn
    FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_snap_rolecache
    WHERE game_id = '312'
      AND ds >= '{analysis_start}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT role_id, b_type, COUNT(*) AS events
  FROM gameeco_odl.v_presto_log_rolebehavior
  WHERE game_id = '312'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id, b_type
),
silent_active AS (
  SELECT s.role_id,
         s.last_pay_ds,
         s.silent_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times,
         ls.role_level,
         ls.role_vip,
         ls.total_pay_money,
         ls.last_pay_time
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON s.role_id = ls.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
)
SELECT
  b.b_type AS 玩法模块,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS 沉默参与人数,
  SUM(b.events) AS 总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(b.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id), 0), 1) AS 人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM silent_active), 0) * 100, 2) AS 参与率,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(sa.total_pay_money) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS 平均累计付费,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(sa.silent_pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS 平均沉默窗付费
FROM silent_active sa
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON sa.role_id = b.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_type
ORDER BY 沉默参与人数 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

free_behavior.name: 免费玩家行为
free_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_paid, role_level, role_vip, total_login_days
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_paid, role_level, role_vip, total_login_days,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC) AS rn
    FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_snap_rolecache
    WHERE game_id = '312'
      AND ds >= '{analysis_start}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
free_roles AS (
  SELECT a.role_id
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON a.role_id = ls.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
    AND (ls.role_paid = 0 OR ls.role_id IS NULL)
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT role_id, b_type, COUNT(*) AS events
  FROM gameeco_odl.v_presto_log_rolebehavior
  WHERE game_id = '312'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id, b_type
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
    AND role_id IN (SELECT role_id FROM free_roles)
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  b.b_type AS 玩法模块,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS 参与人数,
  SUM(b.events) AS 总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(b.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id), 0), 1) AS 人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM free_roles), 0) * 100, 2) AS 参与率,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ld.active_days) AS DECIMAL(18,1)), 0) AS 平均活跃天数,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ls.role_level) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均等级,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ls.role_vip) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均VIP
FROM free_roles fr
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON fr.role_id = b.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON fr.role_id = ls.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_type
ORDER BY 参与人数 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

top_detail.name: Top明细
top_detail.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, total_pay_money
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, total_pay_money,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC) AS rn
    FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_snap_rolecache
    WHERE game_id = '312'
      AND ds >= '{analysis_start}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 312
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
paid_top AS (
  SELECT '付费玩家' AS 分群, CAST(p.role_id AS VARCHAR) AS role_id,
         ls.role_level, ls.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(p.pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         p.pay_times,
         COALESCE(CAST(ls.total_pay_money AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS total_pay_money,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.pay_amount DESC) AS rk
  FROM paid p
  LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON p.role_id = ls.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON p.role_id = ld.role_id
),
silent_top AS (
  SELECT '沉默玩家' AS 分群, CAST(s.role_id AS VARCHAR) AS role_id,
         ls.role_level, ls.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(s.silent_pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times AS pay_times,
         COALESCE(CAST(ls.total_pay_money AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS total_pay_money,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.silent_pay_amount DESC, s.last_pay_ds ASC) AS rk
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON s.role_id = ls.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON s.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
),
free_top AS (
  SELECT '免费玩家' AS 分群, CAST(fr.role_id AS VARCHAR) AS role_id,
         ls.role_level, ls.role_vip,
         0 AS window_pay_amount,
         0 AS pay_times,
         0 AS total_pay_money,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ld.active_days DESC, ls.role_level DESC NULLS LAST) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT role_id
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = 312
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) fr
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON fr.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON fr.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON fr.role_id = ls.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
    AND (ls.role_paid = 0 OR ls.role_id IS NULL)
)
SELECT 分群, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, total_pay_money, active_days
FROM paid_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT 分群, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, total_pay_money, active_days
FROM silent_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT 分群, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, total_pay_money, active_days
FROM free_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
ORDER BY 分群, window_pay_amount DESC

overview.name: 概览
overview.sql:
WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, role_paid
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, role_paid,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC, createtime DESC) AS rn
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = 160
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
classified AS (
  SELECT
    a.role_id,
    CASE
      WHEN p.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
      WHEN s.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
      WHEN li.role_paid = 0 OR li.role_id IS NULL THEN '免费玩家'
      ELSE '沉默玩家'
    END AS segment
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON a.role_id = li.role_id
),
pay_analysis AS (
  SELECT role_id,
         SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  segment AS 分群,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.role_id) AS 人数,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN c.role_id END) AS 付费人数,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS 充值金额,
  COALESCE(SUM(pa.pay_times), 0) AS 充值次数,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT c.role_id) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.role_id), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS ARPU,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN c.role_id END) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN c.role_id END), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS ARPPU
FROM classified c
LEFT JOIN pay_analysis pa ON c.role_id = pa.role_id
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY CASE segment WHEN '付费玩家' THEN 1 WHEN '沉默玩家' THEN 2 WHEN '免费玩家' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

paid_recharge.name: 付费玩家付费点
paid_recharge.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(CAST(pay_itemid AS VARCHAR), '') AS 商品ID,
  CASE pay_type WHEN 1 THEN '购买钻石' WHEN 2 THEN '购买商品' ELSE CAST(pay_type AS VARCHAR) END AS 充值类型,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS 付费人数,
  COUNT(*) AS 付费次数,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS 充值金额,
  ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS 客单价
FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
WHERE game_id = 160
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  {server_filter}
GROUP BY COALESCE(CAST(pay_itemid AS VARCHAR), ''), pay_type
ORDER BY 充值金额 DESC
LIMIT 50

paid_engagement.name: 付费玩家玩法参与
paid_engagement.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
behavior_all AS (
  SELECT b_id, role_id, COUNT(*) AS events
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY b_id, role_id
),
behavior_paid AS (
  SELECT b_id, role_id, events
  FROM behavior_all
  WHERE role_id IN (SELECT role_id FROM paid)
)
SELECT
  ba.b_id AS 行为ID,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ba.role_id) AS 活跃参与人数,
  SUM(ba.events) AS 活跃总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(ba.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ba.role_id), 0), 1) AS 活跃人均次数,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bp.role_id) AS 付费参与人数,
  SUM(bp.events) AS 付费总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(bp.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT bp.role_id), 0), 1) AS 付费人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT bp.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ba.role_id), 0) * 100, 2) AS 付费参与率
FROM behavior_all ba
LEFT JOIN behavior_paid bp ON ba.b_id = bp.b_id AND ba.role_id = bp.role_id
GROUP BY ba.b_id
ORDER BY 活跃总次数 DESC
LIMIT 50

silent_behavior.name: 沉默玩家现状
silent_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds,
         SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC, createtime DESC) AS rn
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = 160
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT role_id, b_id, COUNT(*) AS events
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id, b_id
),
silent_active AS (
  SELECT s.role_id,
         s.last_pay_ds,
         s.silent_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times,
         li.role_level,
         li.role_vip
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.role_id = li.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
)
SELECT
  b.b_id AS 行为ID,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS 沉默参与人数,
  SUM(b.events) AS 总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(b.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id), 0), 1) AS 人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM silent_active), 0) * 100, 2) AS 参与率
FROM silent_active sa
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON sa.role_id = b.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_id
ORDER BY 沉默参与人数 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

free_behavior.name: 免费玩家行为
free_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT role_id
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, role_paid
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip, role_paid,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC, createtime DESC) AS rn
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = 160
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
free_roles AS (
  SELECT a.role_id
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON a.role_id = li.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
    AND (li.role_paid = 0 OR li.role_id IS NULL)
),
behavior AS (
  SELECT role_id, b_id, COUNT(*) AS events
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_bhbehavior
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id, b_id
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
    AND role_id IN (SELECT role_id FROM free_roles)
  GROUP BY role_id
)
SELECT
  b.b_id AS 行为ID,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS 参与人数,
  SUM(b.events) AS 总次数,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(b.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id), 0), 1) AS 人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.role_id) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) FROM free_roles), 0) * 100, 2) AS 参与率,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ld.active_days) AS DECIMAL(18,1)), 0) AS 平均活跃天数,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(li.role_level) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均等级,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(li.role_vip) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均VIP
FROM free_roles fr
LEFT JOIN behavior b ON fr.role_id = b.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.role_id = li.role_id
GROUP BY b.b_id
ORDER BY 参与人数 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

top_detail.name: Top明细
top_detail.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
silent AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE)) AS silent_pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip
  FROM (
    SELECT role_id, role_level, role_vip,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY role_id ORDER BY ds DESC, createtime DESC) AS rn
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = 160
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = 160
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
paid_top AS (
  SELECT '付费玩家' AS 分群, p.role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(p.pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         p.pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.pay_amount DESC) AS rk
  FROM paid p
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON p.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON p.role_id = ld.role_id
),
silent_top AS (
  SELECT '沉默玩家' AS 分群, s.role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         COALESCE(CAST(s.silent_pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.silent_pay_amount DESC, s.last_pay_ds ASC) AS rk
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON s.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL
),
free_top AS (
  SELECT '免费玩家' AS 分群, fr.role_id,
         li.role_level, li.role_vip,
         0 AS window_pay_amount,
         0 AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ld.active_days DESC, li.role_level DESC NULLS LAST) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT role_id
    FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
    WHERE game_id = 160
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
      {server_filter}
  ) fr
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON fr.role_id = p.role_id
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON fr.role_id = s.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.role_id = li.role_id
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.role_id = ld.role_id
  WHERE p.role_id IS NULL AND s.role_id IS NULL
    AND (li.role_paid = 0 OR li.role_id IS NULL)
)
SELECT 分群, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM paid_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT 分群, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM silent_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT 分群, role_id, role_level, role_vip, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM free_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
ORDER BY 分群, window_pay_amount DESC

overview.name: 概览
overview.sql:
WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
),
pay_analysis AS (
  SELECT iuid,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN p.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
    WHEN s.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
    ELSE '免费玩家'
  END AS 分群,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid) AS 人数,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END) AS 付费人数,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 充值钻石数,
  COALESCE(SUM(pa.pay_times), 0) AS 充值次数,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuid), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS 人均充值钻石,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END) > 0
       THEN ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pa.pay_amount) AS DOUBLE), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN a.iuid END), 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS 付费用户人均充值钻石
FROM active a
LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.iuid = p.iuid
LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.iuid = s.iuid
LEFT JOIN pay_analysis pa ON a.iuid = pa.iuid
GROUP BY CASE
  WHEN p.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '付费玩家'
  WHEN s.iuid IS NOT NULL THEN '沉默玩家'
  ELSE '免费玩家'
END
ORDER BY CASE
  WHEN 分群 = '付费玩家' THEN 1
  WHEN 分群 = '沉默玩家' THEN 2
  ELSE 3
END

paid_recharge.name: 付费玩家付费点
paid_recharge.sql:
SELECT
  CASE custom_pra1 WHEN '1' THEN '兑换游戏币' WHEN '2' THEN '直购道具' ELSE custom_pra1 END AS 充值类型,
  COALESCE(custom_pra5, '') AS 直购礼包ID,
  COUNT(DISTINCT iuid) AS 付费人数,
  COUNT(*) AS 付费次数,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 充值钻石数,
  ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS DOUBLE), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) AS 客单价钻石
FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
WHERE gameid = '39'
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
GROUP BY CASE custom_pra1 WHEN '1' THEN '兑换游戏币' WHEN '2' THEN '直购道具' ELSE custom_pra1 END,
           COALESCE(custom_pra5, '')
ORDER BY 充值钻石数 DESC
LIMIT 50

paid_engagement.name: 付费玩家玩法参与
paid_engagement.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
prop_all AS (
  SELECT custom_pra1 AS system_method, iuid,
         COUNT(*) AS events,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS cost
  FROM raw_scribe_log.prop
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY custom_pra1, iuid
),
prop_paid AS (
  SELECT system_method, iuid, events, cost
  FROM prop_all
  WHERE iuid IN (SELECT iuid FROM paid)
)
SELECT
  pa.system_method AS 消费系统,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pa.iuid) AS 活跃消费人数,
  SUM(pa.events) AS 活跃总次数,
  SUM(pa.cost) AS 活跃总消耗,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(pa.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pa.iuid), 0), 1) AS 活跃人均次数,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pp.iuid) AS 付费消费人数,
  SUM(pp.events) AS 付费总次数,
  SUM(pp.cost) AS 付费总消耗,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT pp.iuid) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pa.iuid), 0) * 100, 2) AS 付费参与率
FROM prop_all pa
LEFT JOIN prop_paid pp ON pa.system_method = pp.system_method AND pa.iuid = pp.iuid
GROUP BY pa.system_method
ORDER BY 活跃总消耗 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

silent_behavior.name: 沉默玩家现状
silent_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
silent AS (
  SELECT iuid, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS silent_pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level
  FROM (
    SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY iuid ORDER BY ds DESC, timestamp DESC) AS rn
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
prop AS (
  SELECT iuid, custom_pra1 AS system_method, COUNT(*) AS events,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS cost
  FROM raw_scribe_log.prop
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid, custom_pra1
),
silent_active AS (
  SELECT s.iuid,
         s.last_pay_ds,
         s.silent_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times,
         li.user_level,
         li.vip_level
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.iuid = li.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL
)
SELECT
  p.system_method AS 消费系统,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.iuid) AS 沉默参与人数,
  SUM(p.events) AS 总次数,
  SUM(p.cost) AS 总消耗,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(p.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.iuid), 0), 1) AS 人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.iuid) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT iuid) FROM silent_active), 0) * 100, 2) AS 参与率,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(sa.silent_pay_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均沉默窗充值钻石
FROM silent_active sa
LEFT JOIN prop p ON sa.iuid = p.iuid
GROUP BY p.system_method
ORDER BY 沉默参与人数 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

free_behavior.name: 免费玩家行为
free_behavior.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
silent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
),
active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT iuid
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level
  FROM (
    SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY iuid ORDER BY ds DESC, timestamp DESC) AS rn
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
free_roles AS (
  SELECT a.iuid
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON a.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON a.iuid = s.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL AND s.iuid IS NULL
),
prop AS (
  SELECT iuid, custom_pra1 AS system_method, COUNT(*) AS events,
         SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS cost
  FROM raw_scribe_log.prop
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid, custom_pra1
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT iuid, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    AND iuid IN (SELECT iuid FROM free_roles)
  GROUP BY iuid
)
SELECT
  p.system_method AS 消费系统,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fr.iuid) AS 参与人数,
  SUM(p.events) AS 总次数,
  SUM(p.cost) AS 总消耗,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(p.events) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.iuid), 0), 1) AS 人均次数,
  ROUND(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.iuid) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT iuid) FROM free_roles), 0) * 100, 2) AS 参与率,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(ld.active_days) AS DECIMAL(18,1)), 0) AS 平均活跃天数,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(CAST(li.user_level AS BIGINT)) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均等级,
  COALESCE(CAST(AVG(CAST(li.vip_level AS BIGINT)) AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS 平均VIP
FROM free_roles fr
LEFT JOIN prop p ON fr.iuid = p.iuid
LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.iuid = ld.iuid
LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.iuid = li.iuid
GROUP BY p.system_method
ORDER BY 参与人数 DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

top_detail.name: Top明细
top_detail.sql:
WITH paid AS (
  SELECT iuid, SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS pay_amount, COUNT(*) AS pay_times
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
silent AS (
  SELECT iuid, SUM(CAST(custom_pra3 AS BIGINT)) AS silent_pay_amount,
         COUNT(*) AS silent_pay_times, MAX(ds) AS last_pay_ds
  FROM raw_scribe_log.pay
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{silent_start}' AND '{silent_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
login_info AS (
  SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level
  FROM (
    SELECT iuid, user_level, vip_level,
           row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY iuid ORDER BY ds DESC, timestamp DESC) AS rn
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) WHERE rn = 1
),
login_days AS (
  SELECT iuid, COUNT(DISTINCT ds) AS active_days
  FROM raw_scribe_log.login
  WHERE gameid = '39'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  GROUP BY iuid
),
paid_top AS (
  SELECT '付费玩家' AS 分群, p.iuid,
         li.user_level, li.vip_level,
         COALESCE(CAST(p.pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         p.pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.pay_amount DESC) AS rk
  FROM paid p
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON p.iuid = li.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON p.iuid = ld.iuid
),
silent_top AS (
  SELECT '沉默玩家' AS 分群, s.iuid,
         li.user_level, li.vip_level,
         COALESCE(CAST(s.silent_pay_amount AS DECIMAL(18,0)), 0) AS window_pay_amount,
         s.silent_pay_times AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.silent_pay_amount DESC, s.last_pay_ds ASC) AS rk
  FROM silent s
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON s.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON s.iuid = li.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON s.iuid = ld.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL
),
free_top AS (
  SELECT '免费玩家' AS 分群, fr.iuid,
         li.user_level, li.vip_level,
         0 AS window_pay_amount,
         0 AS pay_times,
         ld.active_days,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ld.active_days DESC, CAST(li.user_level AS BIGINT) DESC NULLS LAST) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT iuid
    FROM raw_scribe_log.login
    WHERE gameid = '39'
      AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  ) fr
  LEFT JOIN paid p ON fr.iuid = p.iuid
  LEFT JOIN silent s ON fr.iuid = s.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_info li ON fr.iuid = li.iuid
  LEFT JOIN login_days ld ON fr.iuid = ld.iuid
  WHERE p.iuid IS NULL AND s.iuid IS NULL
)
SELECT 分群, iuid, user_level, vip_level, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM paid_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT 分群, iuid, user_level, vip_level, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM silent_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
UNION ALL
SELECT 分群, iuid, user_level, vip_level, window_pay_amount, pay_times, active_days
FROM free_top WHERE rk <= {top_n}
ORDER BY 分群, window_pay_amount DESC
